prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约9838→10146→8320→27121→8796，2024年因不限选科专业组（物流管理）出现异常大幅后移，2025年回归至8796名，近2 年基准约8796名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为28、28、28、29、28人，基本稳定；2026年计划大幅扩招至46人，增幅约64.3%，扩招力度显著，竞 争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第113名，近年排名稳定在99–113区间，属中游偏上211层次；该校在声誉舆 情文件中无显著负面或正面事件记录；抖音热度排名第50位，评价为“较热”，综合热度约65.7万，短视频曝光处于中等偏上水平，对报考关注度有一定正向作用。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等该校主要招生专业大类社会热 度持续偏热（2024年电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程高热推荐）；本省2026年普通高考总人数218700人，较2025年（历史类58374+物理类121443=179817）增长约21.6%，考生 规模扩大加剧竞争；该校位于辽宁省大连市，非本省院校，无本地招生倾斜；甘肃省至大连距离较远，地域偏好因素偏中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8796名、2026年计划大幅扩招64.3%（推高位次数字约3393名）、本省考生总数增长约21.6%（部分抵消扩招效应）、不限选科专业组加入可能 吸引更多考生等因素，预测最低位次约11989名，区间11489–12489名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程等）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、测控技术与仪器）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 交通运输类（交通运输、物流工程、材料科学与工程、交通工程）
- 机械类（机械设计制造及其自动化、船舶与海洋工程、能源与动力工程等）
- 管理科学与工程类（信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用、电子商务）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 安全工程
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、海洋科学、海洋资源与环境）
- 公共管理类（公共事业管理、行政管理、社会工作）
- 供应链管理/物流管理
- 工商管理类（工商管理、财务管理）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11489–12489名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如11000名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等热门 专业；位次接近区间上限（12500名左右）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 9838 → 10146 → 8320 → 27121 → 8796. In 2024, due to an anomaly in the unrestricted subject group (Logistics Management), the ranking shifted significantly backward, but returned to 8796 in 2025. The recent two-year baseline is approximately 8796. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 28, 28, 28, 29, and 28 respectively, remaining basically stable. In 2026, the plan expands significantly to 46 students, an increase of about 64.3%, indicating a notable expansion and a clear easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, approximately 113th, with recent rankings stable in the 99–113 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in the university's reputation and public opinion documents. Douyin popularity ranking is 50th, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive heat of about 657,000, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, having a certain positive effect on application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other major enrollment majors of this university remain consistently hot (in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication was highly recommended, Electrical Engineering highly recommended). In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination students in this province is 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (History Category 58,374 + Physics Category 121,443 = 179,817), with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not a local institution, so there is no local enrollment preference. The distance from Gansu to Dalian is relatively far, and regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8796, the 2026 plan's significant expansion of 64.3% (pushing the ranking number up by about 3393), the provincial candidate total increase of about 21.6% (partially offsetting the expansion effect), and the possible addition of unrestricted subject groups attracting more candidates, the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 11989, with a range of 11489–12489.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Transportation (Transportation, Logistics Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Traffic Engineering)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.)
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application, E-commerce)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Safety Engineering
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Marine Science, Marine Resources and Environment)
- Public Management (Public Utilities Management, Administrative Management, Social Work)
- Supply Chain Management/Logistics Management
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Financial Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11489–12489, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 12500), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1981 → 1931 → 1933 → 2078 → 2694. From 2021 to 2024, it was basically stable in the 1900–2100 range, but in 2025 it significantly shifted back to 2694. The recent 1-year baseline is about 2694. The provincial history category enrollment plan was 2 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 3 students from 2024 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 3 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 113th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in the reputation and public opinion files. Douyin popularity ranks 50th, rated as 'relatively hot', which has a certain positive effect on application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Only one major, Public Administration, is offered in the history category. This major category has generally moderate social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not a local institution, so there is no local enrollment preference. The distance from Gansu to Dalian is relatively far, making regional preference factors neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2694, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged (no expansion or contraction), the total number of candidates in the province increasing by about 21.6% (intensified competition), and the 2025 ranking already significantly shifted back compared to previous years, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2724, with a range of 2224–3224.
